title: Huawei IdeaHub S2 75" - Interactive Whiteboard
description: IdeaHub S2 is a multiplatform all-in-one video conferencing device . Combining AI features, BYOM mode , a 4K camera, a 4K display, 12-meter microphones , and four powerful speakers, the S2 model offers top-notch support for your meetings HUAWEI IdeaHub S2 is built on next-generation hardware platform architecture for immersive HD-quality meetings. It features Bring Your Own Meeting (BYOM) , Wi-Fi 6 for direct projection, and ultra-low writing latency, easily adapting to common cloud meeting applications. It is the perfect solution for seamless collaboration and communication, suitable for any room, such as standard meeting rooms, executive offices, and open office spaces BYOM - The BYOM (Bring Your Own Meeting) feature enables smooth transfers from personal devices to HUAWEI IdeaHub S2 Wi-Fi 6 for Direct Projection - One-step projection using Wi-Fi Direct without the need for a shared local network (LAN) Seamless Collaboration - Multi-Window and App Multiplier provide an enriched office ecosystem Professional 4K Camera - Huawei's AI algorithm ensures lifelike and natural image clarity AI-Powered Audio and Video - Voice tracking, Auto-Framing, and an acoustic barrier offer an immersive experience. 12-meter audio capture, DNN-based echo removal, and AEC algorithms deliver clear sound over long distances Smart Whiteboard - Take notes across the screen in full color using a brand-new toolbar. Writing is effortless and intuitive with intelligent recognition and ultra-low latency 4K camera with a lens cover for privacy protection 4K soft-light screen with ultra-narrow bezels for…
